description_long: This object is a modern tactical shotgun with a sleek, matte black finish and a robust, angular design. It features a long cylindrical barrel with a suppressor or extended muzzle attachment, and a prominent optical sight mounted on the top rail. The stock is a thumbhole type, providing ergonomic support and stability, and the receiver area is compact with a visible magazine well. The trigger guard is elongated and squared, offering ample space for gloved fingers. The overall construction suggests a focus on tactical use, with a combination of metal and polymer materials for durability and reduced weight.
description: A modern tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, thumbhole stock, and optical sight, featuring a long barrel and squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and suppressor, with the optical sight and thumbhole stock partially visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the long barrel, optical sight, thumbhole stock, and squared trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the alignment of the optical sight along the top rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with more emphasis on the stock and receiver details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with suppressor or extended muzzle attachment, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, squared trigger guard with ample space and no visible finger grooves
